parentQuestion: Which of the following statements about connective tissue is FALSE?

scaffolds.explain: Vascular means having blood vessels. Well-vascularized tissues have many blood vessels and good blood supply. Avascular tissues have NO blood vessels at all. Simple terminology, but it determines healing speed.

scaffolds.q: Which tissue is known for having NO blood vessels?
scaffolds.explain: Cartilage is avascular (no blood vessels). It receives nutrients by diffusion from surrounding tissues. This is why cartilage injuries heal VERY slowly — no express delivery service. Let me show you why this matters clinically.
